description:
Your simple video editor for creating wow videos

Your simple video editor for creating wow videos
- Easily create clips for your socials, business, or family
- Boost your videos with one-click auto subtitles and other AI tools
- Choose from hundreds of titles, transitions, and music tracks
- Quick video denoise. Clean up grain in no time. AI smooths out visual noise without blurring faces or small details – perfect for low-light clips, on-the-go phone footage, old videos, or greenscreen scenes where sharp edges matter. To try it, open Color adjustments and simply drag Denoise onto your clip – that’s it, your clip is now clean and ready to shine.
